title: Login and access the dashboard
description: Verifies a user can log in with valid phone and password and reach the protected dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Verify OTP for registration and continue to login
description: Verifies a newly-registered user can submit an OTP code on the verification screen and proceed to the login page on success.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill {{FULL_NAME}} into the full name field
Fill {{PHONE_NUMBER}} into the phone number field
Fill {{PASSWORD}} into the password field
Fill {{PASSWORD}} into the confirm password field
Submit the registration form
Fill {{OTP_CODE}} into the OTP code field
Submit the OTP verification form
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: Start registration and proceed to OTP verification screen
description: Verifies a new user can submit the registration form and is taken to the OTP verification screen to continue account creation.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill {{FULL_NAME}} into the full name field
Fill {{PHONE_NUMBER}} into the phone number field
Fill {{PASSWORD}} into the password field
Fill {{PASSWORD}} into the confirm password field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the OTP verification page

title: Request password reset OTP and continue to OTP entry
description: Verifies a user can request a password reset by submitting a phone number and is taken to the OTP entry page to continue recovery.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field
Click the send OTP action
Wait for the next page to load
Verify the user lands on the OTP verification page

title: Reset password successfully and return to login
description: Verifies a user can set a new valid password and is redirected to login with a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /reset-password
Fill ValidPass123! into the new password field
Fill ValidPass123! into the confirm password field
Submit the reset password form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: Submit a booking request from a worker profile
description: Verifies a user can open a worker profile from the workers directory, submit a booking request with required details, and see a booking confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /workers
Click a worker from the list to open the worker profile
Click the booking action to start a booking request
Fill valid booking details into the booking form
Submit the booking request
Verify a booking confirmation is visible

title: Cancel an active booking from the user dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can cancel an active booking from the dashboard and the booking is no longer shown as active.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the login identifier field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the dashboard navigation entry
Cancel an active booking from the bookings list
Verify the cancelled booking no longer appears in the active bookings list
Verify the booking appears under cancelled or past bookings

title: Admin can access admin dashboard and view platform statistics
description: Verifies an admin can log in, open the admin dashboard, and see platform statistics displayed successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Click the login submission control
Click the admin dashboard navigation entry
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
Verify platform statistics are displayed

title: Accept an incoming booking request from the worker dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated worker can accept an incoming booking request and it appears under upcoming bookings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the login identifier field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the dashboard navigation entry
Open the incoming booking requests section
Accept one incoming booking request
Verify the accepted booking appears in the upcoming bookings section
Verify the accepted request is no longer listed as incoming

title: Find a worker using search and filters and open the worker profile
description: Verifies a user can browse the worker directory, refine results with search and filters, and open a worker’s profile from the results list.

steps.description: Navigate to /workers
Fill a search term into the worker search field
Select a category filter option
Select an availability filter option
Click a worker from the results list
Verify the worker profile details page is displayed

title: Submit an offer from task detail and see it listed
description: Verifies a user can open a task, submit an offer with a price and message, and see the offer listed among existing offers.

steps.description: Navigate to /tasks
Click a task from the list to open the task detail
Fill a valid price into the offer form
Fill a valid message into the offer form
Submit the offer
Verify the submitted offer is listed among the offers

title: Browse tasks and open task detail from filtered results
description: Verifies a user can browse tasks, apply a category or status filter, and open a task detail page from the filtered list.

steps.description: Navigate to /tasks
Select a category or status filter
Click a task from the filtered list to open the task detail
Verify the task detail content is displayed

title: Admin can view the user list in user management
description: Verifies an admin can navigate to user management and see the platform user list loaded successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Click the login submission control
Navigate to /admin
Click the user management section entry
Verify the users are listed
Verify each listed user shows identifying details

title: Rate a completed booking from the user dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can rate a completed booking and the dashboard reflects that the booking is rated.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the login identifier field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the dashboard navigation entry
Open a completed booking that supports rating
Select a rating value
Submit the rating
Verify the booking shows as rated or includes the submitted rating state

title: Non-admin cannot access the admin dashboard
description: Verifies a non-admin user is prevented from accessing the admin dashboard and is routed to a non-admin experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Click the login submission control
Navigate to /admin
Verify access to the admin dashboard is denied
Verify the user is shown a non-admin destination or message

title: Submit a worker profile for approval
description: Verifies an authenticated user can submit the become-worker form with required details and sees a confirmation that the profile is pending admin approval.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the login identifier field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the become-worker navigation entry
Fill valid skills into the skills field
Fill a valid description into the description field
Fill a valid hourly rate into the hourly rate field
Select an availability option
Submit the worker profile form
Verify a submission confirmation is visible indicating the application is pending approval

title: Admin can approve a pending worker application
description: Verifies an admin can approve a pending worker application and the application moves out of the pending state to a verified/approved state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Click the login submission control
Navigate to /admin
Click the pending worker applications section entry
Click to open a pending worker application
Approve the worker application
Verify the worker application is no longer shown as pending
Verify the worker is shown as approved or verified in the admin view

title: Review worker profile details before booking
description: Verifies a user can view a worker’s skills, rating, and reviews on the profile page to inform a booking decision.

steps.description: Navigate to /workers
Click a worker from the list to open the worker profile
Verify the worker skills are displayed
Verify rating and reviews are displayed

title: Prevent reset when confirmation password does not match
description: Verifies the reset password form blocks submission when passwords mismatch and shows a mismatch validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /reset-password
Fill ValidPass123! into the new password field
Fill DifferentPass123! into the confirm password field
Submit the reset password form
Verify a password mismatch validation error is displayed
Verify the user remains on the reset-password page

title: Admin can reject a pending worker application with an admin note
description: Verifies an admin can reject a pending worker application with an optional note and the application becomes marked as rejected.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Click the login submission control
Navigate to /admin
Click the pending worker applications section entry
Click to open a pending worker application
Fill a note into the admin note field
Reject the worker application
Verify the worker application is marked as rejected
Verify the rejection note is visible on the application

title: Require strong password on reset
description: Verifies the reset password form blocks weak passwords and shows a password strength validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /reset-password
Fill 123456 into the new password field
Fill 123456 into the confirm password field
Submit the reset password form
Verify a weak password validation error is displayed
Verify the user remains on the reset-password page

title: View notification details from the user dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the notifications area and view notification details when selecting an item.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the login identifier field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the dashboard navigation entry
Open the notifications panel
Click a notification item
Verify the notification detail view is displayed

title: Show validation error for incorrect OTP
description: Verifies submitting an incorrect OTP shows an invalid-OTP error and does not allow the user to continue.

steps.description: Navigate to /verify-otp
Fill {{INVALID_OTP_CODE}} into the OTP code field
Submit the OTP verification form
Verify an invalid OTP error is visible
Verify the user remains on the OTP verification page

title: Review offers on a posted task from the worker dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated worker can open a task from the dashboard tasks area and view its offers list if present.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the login identifier field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the dashboard navigation entry
Open the tasks or offers section
Click a task entry to review offers
Verify the task detail view shows an offers list or an empty offers state

title: Block registration when passwords do not match
description: Verifies registration is prevented when the password and confirm password values differ and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill {{FULL_NAME}} into the full name field
Fill {{PHONE_NUMBER}} into the phone number field
Fill {{PASSWORD}} into the password field
Fill {{DIFFERENT_PASSWORD}} into the confirm password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a password mismatch validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the registration page

title: Prevent offer submission when price or message is missing
description: Verifies submitting an offer without a required price or message is blocked and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /tasks
Click a task from the list to open the task detail
Fill the offer form leaving either price or message empty
Submit the offer
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the offer is not submitted

title: Block login with invalid credentials
description: Verifies login fails with incorrect credentials and the user sees an invalid-credentials error without reaching the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone field
Fill {{WRONG_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page

title: Block OTP request when phone number format is invalid
description: Verifies the forgot-password form prevents continuing when the phone number format is invalid and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill 123 into the phone number field
Click the send OTP action
Verify a phone number validation error is displayed
Verify the user remains on the forgot-password page

title: Prevent booking submission when required booking details are missing
description: Verifies submitting a booking request with missing required fields is blocked and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /workers
Click a worker from the list to open the worker profile
Click the booking action to start a booking request
Fill incomplete booking details leaving at least one required field empty
Submit the booking request
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the booking request is not submitted

title: Validate required fields on become-worker submission
description: Verifies the become-worker form prevents submission when required fields are missing and shows validation feedback to the user.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the login identifier field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the become-worker navigation entry
Clear any prefilled values for required fields if present
Submit the worker profile form
Verify validation errors are displayed for the missing required fields

title: Show clear error when registration phone input is invalid and server rejects OTP send
description: Verifies submitting registration with an invalid phone format results in a clear, user-visible error and does not proceed to OTP verification.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill {{FULL_NAME}} into the full name field
Fill {{INVALID_PHONE}} into the phone number field
Fill {{PASSWORD}} into the password field
Fill {{PASSWORD}} into the confirm password field
Submit the registration form
Verify an error message is visible indicating the registration cannot continue
Verify the user remains on the registration page

title: Show empty state when worker filters return no results
description: Verifies the workers page shows an empty state when filters yield no matches and allows the user to adjust filters to recover results.

steps.description: Navigate to /workers
Fill an unlikely search term into the worker search field
Select a restrictive category filter option
Select a restrictive availability filter option
Verify an empty results state is displayed
Clear the search term or relax at least one filter
Verify worker listings are displayed

title: Show empty state when filters exclude all tasks and recover by changing filters
description: Verifies the tasks page shows an empty state when filters yield no results and the user can modify filters to see tasks again.

steps.description: Navigate to /tasks
Select filters that exclude all tasks
Wait for the filtered results to update
Modify or clear at least one filter
Verify an empty state is shown when no tasks match
Verify tasks are listed after adjusting filters

title: Handle empty bookings state on the user dashboard
description: Verifies the dashboard shows an appropriate empty state when the authenticated user has no bookings to display.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the login identifier field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the dashboard navigation entry
Switch between bookings tabs or filters if available
Verify an empty state is displayed indicating there are no bookings

title: Resend OTP and verify using the new code
description: Verifies a user can request a resend of the OTP and then successfully verify using the newly received code.

steps.description: Navigate to /verify-otp
Request a resend of the OTP
Wait for the resend confirmation to appear
Fill {{NEW_OTP_CODE}} into the OTP code field
Submit the OTP verification form
Verify OTP verification succeeds and the user can continue to the next step of the flow

title: Prevent invalid hourly rate values on become-worker form
description: Verifies the become-worker form blocks clearly invalid hourly rate input and keeps the user on the form with validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the login identifier field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the become-worker navigation entry
Fill valid skills into the skills field
Fill a valid description into the description field
Fill an invalid hourly rate value into the hourly rate field
Submit the worker profile form
Verify a validation error is shown for the hourly rate and the form is not submitted

title: Toggle password visibility while registering
description: Verifies a user can toggle password visibility on the registration form without losing entered values.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill {{PASSWORD}} into the password field
Toggle password visibility
Toggle password visibility again
Fill {{PASSWORD}} into the confirm password field
Verify both password fields still contain user-entered values
